series_metadata.series_description: File contains information regarding application, certification and continuing education of electrical safety inspectors; and training and status of electrical safety inspector trainees.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years after records become inactive, then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain machine readable records on computer database until superseded or until record series is no longer created, then destroy by erasure., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
